defines the gap-fill leg ('Price Returns to Fill the Gap' = high-prob retracement entry) -> the RETEST half of mitigation; maps to fvg_n CE-hold + a mitigation retest, not to mitigation.py's displacement-origin block

CANONICAL definition: mitigation = OB retested WITHOUT taking the prior high ('No Break'); breaker = WITH break. This is ob_taught's MIT-vs-BRK flip law (pex sweep test) EXACTLY; mitigation.py does NOT implement the No-Break/sweep test at all
